diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,165 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory class, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: TypeScript class with generics, template literal types for handler combinations
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, uses Hono from '../hono', types from '../../types'
+- Safe summary: Factory helper provides factory pattern for creating Hono apps with handler grouping from 1-10
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: TypeScript functions with Context parameter, uses utils from '../../utils/url'
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, imports Context from '../../context', GET_MATCH_RESULT from '../../request/constants'
+- Safe summary: Route helper exposes metadata about matched routes including path, base path, and parameterized routes
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: defineWebSocketHelper, WSContext, WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContextInit
+- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces, classes, and type definitions for WebSocket functionality
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, imports Context from '../../context', types from '../../types'
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper provides upgrade middleware and context management for WebSocket connections
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: TypeScript functions wrapping cookie utilities from '../../utils/cookie'
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, imports Context from '../../context', cookie utilities from '../../utils/cookie'
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper abstracts cookie reading, writing, and signed cookie operations with support for prefix types
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: TypeScript function returning hc client wrapper
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, imports client from '../../client', types from '../../client/types', ExecutionContext from '../../context'
+- Safe summary: Testing helper provides test client generation for Hono apps using hc with custom fetch
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: TypeScript functions for runtime detection and environment extraction
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, imports Context from '../../context'
+- Safe summary: Adapter helper detects runtime environment (node, deno, bun, workerd, etc.) and extracts environment bindings
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: TypeScript functions and interfaces for CSS-in-JS style generation
+- Neighbor files: Reads from '../../helper/html', '../../jsx/constants', '../../jsx/dom/css', '../../utils/html', './common'
+- Safe summary: CSS helper provides dynamic style generation with class name hashing and view transitions for Hono apps
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, toHash, minify, rawCssString
+- Reads as: TypeScript utility functions for CSS string building and processing
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, provides shared utilities for css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Common CSS utilities for building, hashing, minifying CSS strings and handling class names from css helper
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: TypeScript async function with Request handling
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, imports HTTPException from '../../http-exception', RequestHeader from '../../utils/headers'
+- Safe summary: Proxy helper wraps fetch for proxy requests with header filtering and Hop-by-Hop header handling per RFC 9110
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: TypeScript functions for route inspection and display
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, imports Hono from '../../hono', types from '../../types', utils from '../../utils/color', '../../utils/handler'
+- Safe summary: Dev helper provides route inspection and pretty printing of Hono app routes with optional color support
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: TypeScript function handling template string interpolation with escaping
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, imports utils from '../../utils/html'
+- Safe summary: HTML helper escapes template strings to prevent XSS while allowing HtmlEscapedString callbacks for dynamic content
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: TypeScript exports re-exporting from './ssg', './middleware', './plugins'
+- Neighbor files: Reads ssg from './ssg', middleware from './middleware', plugins from './plugins'
+- Safe summary: SSG helper generates static HTML by fetching and saving page content to filesystem with hooks and plugins
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, ToSSGResult, SSGPlugin
+- Reads as: TypeScript generator functions and async functions for static site generation
+- Neighbor files: Reads from '../../client/utils', '../../hono', '../../utils/concurrent', '../../utils/mime', './middleware', './plugins', './utils'
+- Safe summary: Core SSG implementation generates static routes by fetching content at runtime and saving to filesystem using pool concurrency
+
+## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
+- Reads as: TypeScript utility functions for path manipulation and route filtering
+- Neighbor files: No direct reads, imports path logic, types from '../../hono', '../../types', '../../utils/handler'
+- Safe summary: SSG utilities handle path operations, dynamic route detection, and output directory safety checks
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSGParamsMiddleware, AddedSSGDat
